title: Berlin Day Survival
subtitle: Your budget is small. Berlin is hungry. Choose wisely.

audio.voiceDirection: Dry Berlin guide voice. Short, lightly amused, practical, never shouty. English must stay clear for tourists.
audio.ambiencePromptSuffix: Subtle realistic Berlin ambience for a mobile web game, no music, no foreground speech, low intensity, loop-friendly, natural city texture.

budgets.label: EUR 10
budgets.description: Every choice matters. One landmark mistake can end the day.

budgets.label: EUR 15
budgets.description: Enough to be smart, not enough to be careless.

budgets.label: EUR 20
budgets.description: A little room to breathe. Berlin can still find your wallet.

conditions.label: First Day in Berlin
conditions.lead: You just arrived, your phone is at 43%, and confidence is doing too much work.

conditions.label: Sunny Saturday
conditions.lead: Everyone is outside. Lines are longer, benches are rare, and the city smells like warm pavement.

conditions.label: Rainy Museum Day
conditions.lead: The sky has chosen museums. So has every other tourist with a jacket.

conditions.label: Sunday Shops Closed
conditions.lead: You forgot Berlin takes Sunday seriously. Supermarkets are not emotionally available.

conditions.label: Heatwave Walk
conditions.lead: The sun is not decorative today. Water decisions suddenly matter.

conditions.label: Late Arrival
conditions.lead: You promised yourself you would eat properly later. That sentence is now evidence.

rounds.title: It is 10:30. You skipped breakfast and Berlin has noticed.

ambience.prompt: Small Berlin bakery morning ambience, paper bags, quiet counter movement, coffee machine far away, light street noise outside

choices.feedback: Respectable. Cheap, filling, and not tragic.
Quietly effective. No romance, but the day continues.
The view was nice. The bill had main-character energy.
Bold choice. Your wallet clapped. Your stomach did not.

rounds.title: You have walked 8,000 steps and the weather is getting personal.

ambience.prompt: Warm Berlin street ambience with footsteps, distant tram, bottle opening, city square atmosphere, low intensity

choices.text: Refill bottle at a public fountain
choices.feedback: Excellent. Berlin has rewarded your basic survival skills.
Simple, fast, correct. The fridge glow did its job.
Very Berlin. Slightly caffeinated. Mostly fine.

choices.text: Tourist kiosk bottle near the big square
choices.feedback: Necessary, but expensive. Thirst near landmarks is a business model.

rounds.title: You are near a famous square. Hunger is now making decisions for you.

ambience.prompt: Busy Berlin landmark square ambience, tourists passing, distant street performer, light traffic, food kiosk activity, natural outdoor space

choices.text: Walk two blocks before choosing food
choices.feedback: Strong move. Ten minutes of patience can save the whole budget.

choices.text: Random currywurst next to the landmark
choices.feedback: Tourist-zone hunger is a financial event.
Not glamorous. Extremely functional. Berlin respects function.
The perfect place is imaginary. Your blood sugar is real.

rounds.title: It is lunch time. You need food that can carry the next two hours.

ambience.prompt: Berlin lunch counter ambience, quiet queue, grill hiss, paper wrapping, street sounds outside, no clear speech

choices.feedback: Every crisis had one answer. Bread, sauce, repeat.

choices.text: Currywurst away from the postcard zone
choices.feedback: A better currywurst decision than most visitors manage.

choices.text: Proper cafe lunch and sit down
choices.feedback: Your feet wrote a thank-you note. Your budget did not sign it.

choices.text: Second coffee. Food is a mindset.
choices.feedback: This is not lunch. This is a postponement with foam.

rounds.title: It is 16:40. Your feet are negotiating with your brain.

ambience.prompt: Berlin park bench afternoon ambience, footsteps passing, distant bicycle bell, soft tram rumble, paper bag rustle, relaxed city air

choices.feedback: You discovered the true luxury: sitting down at the right moment.
You have discovered the ancient power of bread.

choices.text: Nuts or chocolate from the bag
choices.feedback: Suspiciously prepared. Highly effective.

choices.text: Push through and pretend this is character growth
choices.feedback: Berlin walking days punish false confidence.

rounds.title: Dinner plans collapsed. This is no longer a meal; it is a rescue mission.

ambience.prompt: Late Berlin Späti street ambience, refrigerator hum, bottle clinks, quiet sidewalk, distant tram, soft nighttime city texture

choices.feedback: The sacred triangle: Späti, bench, something wrapped.
A repeat decision, but Berlin has forgiven worse.

choices.text: Supermarket before closing, if it is not Sunday

sunday-shops.feedback: It is Sunday. The supermarket is a memory.

choices.feedback: Good logistics, unless Berlin's opening hours have other plans.
You did eat. The budget, however, left the chat.

results.title: Smart Wanderer
results.description: You kept money, energy and dignity in the same day. Rare work.
results.tip: The best Berlin day usually has one proper food break, one water plan and fewer landmark impulse buys.

results.title: Späti Strategist
results.description: You built a full Berlin day out of small decisions and suspicious confidence.
results.tip: Spätis are useful, but the real trick is knowing when to use one and when to walk two blocks first.

results.title: Döner Loyalist
results.description: Every crisis had one answer. Bread, sauce, repeat.
results.tip: A döner can save a Berlin day, but your route still needs water and a sit-down moment.

results.title: Club Mate Creature
results.description: You are awake, mobile and legally 38% caffeine.
results.tip: Caffeine helps. Lunch helps more. Berlin walking days are not powered by bubbles alone.

results.title: Budget Saint
results.description: You protected every euro with heroic discipline. Your energy would like a word.
results.tip: Saving money is easier when you plan one cheap real meal instead of five emergency non-meals.

results.title: Alexanderplatz Victim
results.description: The city saw you were hungry near a landmark and acted accordingly.
results.tip: In tourist zones, walk a little before buying food. Hunger near famous squares gets expensive fast.

results.title: Sunday Casualty
results.description: You learned Berlin opening hours the hard way.
results.tip: On Sundays, plan earlier: bakeries, kiosks, restaurants and Spätis matter more than supermarkets.

results.title: Late-Night Survivor
results.description: You survived. Was it elegant? Not always. Was it Berlin? Absolutely.
results.tip: The smart version of chaos is simple: water, one filling stop, and a route that does not fight itself.
